langfuse_source_truth: Local CLI exposes capture labels distill and no import dispatcher branch.
kolm_target: Fixture-only importer entry point that writes normalized JSONL manifest and loss report.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Command help and dispatch test must prove fixture mode exists before any live API fetch.
risk: A hidden API-first connector would make privacy and loss behavior hard to test.
recommended_action: Add a fixture-only command contract before credential or network support.

langfuse_source_truth: Current capture stores flattened prompt and response rows with corpus_namespace while bridge filters use namespace.
kolm_target: Separate importer rows from existing observations until namespace and structure are normalized.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture output must not insert directly into current observations or labels export.
risk: Reusing current capture rows would lose hierarchy scores datasets and retention state.
recommended_action: Keep import output sidecar-based until trace schemas are implemented.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse documents API and SDK query access using project keys and region-specific hosts.
kolm_target: Source connector configuration without persisted secrets for fixture mode.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture test must prove no credential field is required or written in fixture mode.
risk: Credential handling can leak into manifests before privacy gates exist.
recommended_action: Keep fixture command offline and add a later credential-source spec.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse Observations API v2 supports field groups for core basic time IO metadata model usage prompt and metrics.
kolm_target: kolm-trace-1 observation rows with metrics IO and prompt refs.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Expected normalized output must show group fields preserved or explicitly lost by path.
risk: Field-group selection can silently omit cost latency prompt or IO.
recommended_action: Fixture must include full and minimal field-group examples.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse observation query returns cursor-paginated rows and documents a high page limit.
kolm_target: Importer manifest page_refs and complete_source_window flag.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture must contain at least two pages and fail if final cursor is not consumed.
risk: Partial imports can look successful while missing late rows.
recommended_action: Add cursor pagination acceptance fixture before API fetch support.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse exposes trace list and get surfaces with trace-level metadata.
kolm_target: kolm-trace-1 root row with source trace id timestamps and routing metadata.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Trace root row is required for every observation traceId referenced by the fixture.
risk: Observations without root rows weaken hierarchy and purge grouping.
recommended_action: Require trace-root join checks in expected.normalized.jsonl.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse trace and observation surfaces can carry user id session id tags environment and metadata.
kolm_target: Tenant-salted identity hashes plus routing tags and environment.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Expected rows must include user_hash session_hash and no direct user or session source value in redacted mode.
risk: Direct source identifiers can leak into artifacts logs and dashboards.
recommended_action: Add deterministic salt fixture and direct-ID negative checks.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse observations distinguish generation records from other observation types.
kolm_target: kind generation mapped to eval-candidate trace evidence.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Generation rows must preserve parent span trace id model timing and IO fields.
risk: Treating every observation as eval input creates noisy or invalid evals.
recommended_action: Use generation-only eval-source mode as the default fixture path.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse spans and events can describe tool work or trace context that is not a model generation.
kolm_target: kind span or event as trace evidence not eval case by default.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Loss report must explain skip reason when eval-source generations-only is selected.
risk: Tool spans can be incorrectly converted into prompt-response tests.
recommended_action: Keep non-generation observations in normalized trace rows while excluding holdout evals.

fixture_or_surface: input and output JSON chat messages
langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse input and output fields can contain structured JSON payloads from application traces.
kolm_target: input.messages and output.message or output.text in kolm-trace-1.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture must compare structured messages not just flattened strings.
risk: Flattening destroys role order tool calls and future artifact eval fidelity.
recommended_action: Add JSON chat and parse-failure fixture rows.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse observation examples include usage and cost detail fields for model calls.
kolm_target: metrics prompt_tokens completion_tokens total_tokens and cost_usd.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Expected rows must preserve token and cost fields or record loss by source path.
risk: Cost-saving claims cannot be measured if import drops spend evidence.
recommended_action: Add usage and cost preservation assertions.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse observation fields include model prompt linkage latency and time-to-first-token style metrics.
kolm_target: metrics model latency_us first_token_latency_us and prompt refs.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture must convert seconds to microseconds deterministically and preserve prompt ids as source refs.
risk: Latency and prompt lineage are common buyer proof fields.
recommended_action: Add model timing and prompt-reference examples to observations-v2.json.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse scores support numeric values and configs with ranges.
kolm_target: kolm-score-1 numeric score evidence with scale direction and threshold from score-map.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture must fail closed if numeric direction or threshold is missing for eval selection.
risk: Numeric values from external systems can invert quality semantics.
recommended_action: Require explicit score-map for every numeric score used beyond evidence.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse scores support boolean values attached to traces observations sessions or dataset runs.
kolm_target: kolm-score-1 boolean evidence with scorer origin and attachment target.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Boolean rows may become eval-selection evidence only through a source-approved score-map.
risk: A boolean pass flag can be mistaken for Kolm K-score.
recommended_action: Preserve boolean source score but do not emit artifact score fields.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse scores support categorical values and configs with categories.
kolm_target: kolm-score-1 categorical evidence plus required category mapping.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Missing score-map must create a loss row and block eval-selection use.
risk: Labels like good bad toxic or helpful are source-specific and not portable without mapping.
recommended_action: Add category-map fixture with both mapped and unmapped labels.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse supports text score values and comments for qualitative feedback.
kolm_target: kolm-score-1 qualitative evidence only.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Text score requested for eval selection must create a loss row unless a later rubric parser exists.
risk: Free text can leak sensitive content and cannot directly compute K-score.
recommended_action: Store text scores only under selected privacy mode and exclude from eval selection.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse scores can attach to traces observations sessions or dataset runs.
kolm_target: attached_to block with trace_id observation_id session_id dataset_run_id as applicable.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Every score row must resolve exactly one supported attachment set or report ambiguity.
risk: Detached scores are hard to purge and can corrupt eval attribution.
recommended_action: Add one score for each attachment target in scores.json.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse datasets are collections of inputs and optional expected outputs.
kolm_target: kolm-evalcase-1 candidate from dataset item input expected output and metadata.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Dataset item becomes an eval case only when expected output exists and status allows it.
risk: Missing expected output can produce hollow evals that always fail or always pass.
recommended_action: Add accepted and missing-expected dataset items.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse datasets can link items back to source traces and observations.
kolm_target: Manifest or sidecar source refs not embedded artifact eval fields.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Expected evalcases must omit source trace and observation IDs while manifest keeps them.
risk: Portable artifacts can leak production trace identifiers.
recommended_action: Add negative assertion for source IDs inside expected.evalcases.jsonl.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse documents dataset versioning by timestamp.
kolm_target: Manifest source_window and dataset_version_timestamp fields.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture must prove identical timestamp selection produces identical normalized rows.
risk: Changing datasets can make eval packs non-reproducible.
recommended_action: Record dataset version timestamp in expected.manifest.json.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse datasets support schema enforcement for dataset items.
kolm_target: kolm-evalcase-1 validation loss when fixture payload violates expected shape.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Invalid dataset item should create a loss row without raw sample values in redacted mode.
risk: Schema-invalid rows can create brittle compile tests or leak values in errors.
recommended_action: Add valid and invalid schema item fixtures.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse dataset workflows include item status and managed datasets.
kolm_target: Eval selection status gate plus loss-report skip reason.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Archived or deleted item must not become a holdout eval by default.
risk: Stale dataset rows can reintroduce cases the source system retired.
recommended_action: Add archived item skip assertion in expected.loss-report.json.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse documents retention and deletion behavior for traces and related rows.
kolm_target: kolm-import-manifest-1 privacy retention and source deletion refs.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Manifest must capture retention_days purge_after and source deletion reference fields.
risk: Imported data lifecycle can diverge from source-system lifecycle.
recommended_action: Add retention fixture and purge target refs before implementation.

langfuse_source_truth: Prior importer policy defines privacy modes that should apply uniformly across sources.
kolm_target: Mode-specific output snapshots for normalized rows manifest and loss report.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Same fixture must produce deterministic differences across privacy modes.
risk: Importer privacy bugs are often invisible in happy-path normalized rows.
recommended_action: Add redacted and hash-only expected outputs before raw support.

langfuse_source_truth: The manifest contract requires source checksum row refs counts privacy block loss refs artifacts and purge state.
kolm_target: kolm-import-manifest-1 generated for every fixture import.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Manifest counts must equal source rows normalized rows evalcases score rows blocked rows and loss rows.
risk: Without count checks partial imports can pass silently.
recommended_action: Add manifest count parity validation to fixture test plan.

langfuse_source_truth: Prior loss-report policy requires field paths counts and no raw samples by default.
kolm_target: No-sample loss rows tied to source path reason privacy mode and manifest id.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture must fail if loss rows include raw source payload snippets in redacted or hash-only mode.
risk: Loss reports can become shadow stores of sensitive IO.
recommended_action: Add parse failure score-map missing and archived-item loss cases.

langfuse_source_truth: Trace schema policy keeps source IDs privacy metadata and raw refs out of portable artifact evals.
kolm_target: kolm-evalcase-1 allowlist for artifact-bound eval fields.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Expected evalcase output must contain input expected output metadata allowlist and no source trace IDs.
risk: A compiled artifact can outlive purge control and expose source identifiers.
recommended_action: Add artifact-boundary negative tests to fixture pack.

langfuse_source_truth: Manifest purge contract requires dry-run before delete or anonymize modes.
kolm_target: Dry-run output enumerating rows scores raw sidecars loss reports caches writebacks and non-purgeable artifacts.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture import must support purge dry-run with zero live side effects.
risk: Operators need exact impact before destructive lifecycle actions.
recommended_action: Add fixture manifest dry-run expected output after normalized fixture locks.

langfuse_source_truth: Kolm K-score should be recomputed from artifact evals and receipts not copied from external scores.
kolm_target: Importer emits source scores only as kolm-score-1 evidence.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Fixture must fail if any imported Langfuse score writes k_score eval_score or artifact score fields.
risk: External score reuse would corrupt the meaning of Kolm conformance.
recommended_action: Add no-K-score assertion to expected.normalized.jsonl validation.

langfuse_source_truth: Langfuse combines traces observations scores datasets retention and API access in one source.
kolm_target: First importer implementation sequence starts with offline fixture pack and schemas.
acceptance_or_loss_rule: Backlog should block live API support until fixture pack validates structural preservation privacy and manifests.
risk: API-first work can mask schema and privacy defects behind real credentials.
recommended_action: Prioritize Langfuse fixture pack before Helicone LangSmith Braintrust or write-back work.
